components.value: V, S, M (a small piece of doppelganger flesh)

description.value: This spell functions as alter self, except you can as a swift action alter the disguise (within the limitations of alter self ). For example, you could transform yourself into a halfling, then a lizardfolk, then an elf, and so on. You can change your form a number of times equal to your caster level.
